#Imports
import json
from pyspark.sql.types import ArrayType, StructType, StructField, StringType, TimestampType, DoubleType, BooleanType
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, explode, lit

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "aveva_pi_landing_to_raw"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch


#Get Current Date
#Bronze_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Bronze_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Bronze_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

# Define the JSON schema
file_schema = StructType([
    StructField("Links", StructType([]),True),
    StructField("Items", ArrayType(StructType([
        StructField("Timestamp", StringType(), True),
        StructField("Value", StringType(), True),
        StructField("UnitsAbbreviation", StringType(), True),
        StructField("Good", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("Questionable", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("Substituted", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("Annotated", BooleanType(), True),
        StructField("Errors", StringType(), True)
    ])),True)

#Retrieve files to be processed from Landing
landing_path = f"abfss://{source_container}@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{source_path}/{db_tablename}"

try:
    landing_files_list = mssparkutils.fs.ls(landing_path)

    #Check for empty directory
    if not landing_files_list:
        print(f"Warning: No files found in {landing_path}")

    else:
        #Process each file
        raw_dfs = []
        for file in landing_files_list:
            file_path = file.path
            file_name = file.name
            tag_name = file.name.split("__")[0]#Double Underscore separates the TagName from the StartTime component, controlled via ADF activity 'Set variable vFileName'

            json_df = spark.read.schema(file_schema).json(file_path)

            exploded_df = json_df.select(explode(col("Items")).alias("Item"))

            # Associate the TagName with the records
            file_df = exploded_df.select(
            lit(tag_name).alias("TagName"),
            col("Item.Timestamp").alias("Timestamp"),
            col("Item.Value").alias("Value"),
            col("Item.UnitsAbbreviation").alias("UnitsAbbreviation"),
            col("Item.Good").alias("Good"),
            col("Item.Questionable").alias("Questionable"),
            col("Item.Substituted").alias("Substituted"),
            col("Item.Annotated").alias("Annotated"),
            col("Item.Errors").alias("Errors")
            )

            raw_dfs.append(file_df)

        if raw_dfs: #Check if there are any files / dataframes available to process
            raw_df = raw_dfs[0]
            for df in raw_dfs[1:]:
                raw_df = raw_df.union(df)

except Exception as e:
    print(f"Failed to process files from: {landing_path}: {str(e)}")
